Hillsborough County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Hillsborough County, Florida

FHA loans across Hillsborough County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why the Tampa area is so FHA-friendly, and how to get pre-approved.

Hillsborough County Home Loans

FHA loans in Hillsborough County, Florida

Hillsborough County anchors the Tampa Bay region, blending the urban core of Tampa with booming suburbs like Brandon and Riverview. It's one of Florida's strongest FHA markets: prices that largely sit under the loan limit, abundant new construction in the growth corridors, and steady job growth drawing buyers from across the country. For most Hillsborough homes, FHA's 3.5% down is all you need to get started.

Hillsborough County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Hillsborough County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Hillsborough County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). Across most of Hillsborough, that covers the large majority of homes, including the new construction in fast-growing suburbs. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Hillsborough County's exact figure with HUD.

Urban Tampa and the booming suburbs

In the city of Tampa, FHA works for single-family homes and FHA-approved condos alike (see our condo guide). In the growth corridors — Brandon, Riverview, and beyond — new-construction homes pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit within the loan limit, making them ideal for first-time buyers. Pair FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds to keep your upfront cash low.

Cities We Serve

FHA loans in Hillsborough County cities

We help FHA buyers throughout Hillsborough County, including Tampa, Brandon, Riverview. Explore our local guides for a closer look at the market, loan limits, and down payment help in each:

TampaBrandonRiverview

Down payment help in Hillsborough County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Hillsborough County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Hillsborough County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Hillsborough County for 2026?+
Hillsborough County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Hillsborough County?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — above the typical price across most of the county.
Is the Tampa area good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — affordable prices relative to the limit, lots of new construction in the suburbs, and strong job growth make it one of Florida's best FHA markets.
How much down payment do I need in Hillsborough County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Hillsborough County?+
Yes — Tampa, Brandon, Riverview, Plant City, and every community in the county.
